hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl+ tracking-tighter leading-none font-medium italic-leaning

effects.film_grain: url('data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox="0 0 200 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"%3E%3Cfilter id="noiseFilter"%3E%3CfeTurbulence type="fractalNoise" baseFrequency="0.65" numOctaves="3" stitchTiles="stitch"/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width="100%25" height="100%25" filter="url(%23noiseFilter)"/%3E%3C/svg%3E') fixed opacity-10 pointer-events-none

navbar.style: glassmorphism sticky top-0 z-50 border-b border-white/5
navbar.cta: bg-primary text-primary_foreground rounded-none px-6 py-2 text-sm uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-primary/90
navbar.i18n_switcher: text-sm text-[#8F8F99] hover:text-[#F4F1EA] flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer

hero.style: relative min-h-[90vh] flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden
hero.background: full-bleed photo with object-cover scale-105 for subtle parallax
hero.overlay: bg-gradient-to-b from-black/40 via-black/60 to-[#0A0A0F] absolute inset-0
hero.title: font-heading text-6xl md:text-8xl text-[#F4F1EA] tracking-tighter mb-6
hero.subtitle: font-body text-xl text-[#F4F1EA]/80 max-w-2xl mx-auto font-light

pricing_card.base: bg-[#121217] border border-white/5 p-8 flex flex-col relative overflow-hidden
pricing_card.popular_badge: absolute top-0 right-0 bg-[#7C3AED] text-[#F4F1EA] text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest px-4 py-1 rounded-bl-lg
pricing_card.button: mt-auto w-full border border-white/10 hover:bg-[#7C3AED] hover:border-[#7C3AED] transition-colors text-[#F4F1EA] py-3 text-sm tracking-wide
pricing_card.button_popular: mt-auto w-full bg-[#7C3AED] hover:bg-[#6D28D9] transition-colors text-[#F4F1EA] py-3 text-sm tracking-wide

dashboard_sidebar.style: w-64 bg-[#0A0A0F] border-r border-white/5 h-screen sticky top-0 flex flex-col p-6
dashboard_sidebar.links: font-body text-sm text-[#8F8F99] hover:text-[#C4B5FD] py-3 transition-colors flex items-center gap-4 border-l-2 border-transparent pl-4 -ml-6

generate_page.tab_item: px-6 py-4 text-sm font-body border-b-2 border-transparent text-[#8F8F99] hover:text-[#F4F1EA] cursor-pointer transition-colors

image_result_modal.backdrop: fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[#0A0A0F]/95 backdrop-blur-md flex items-center justify-center p-4 sm:p-8
image_result_modal.container: relative w-full max-w-7xl h-full max-h-[85vh] bg-[#121217] border border-white/10 flex flex-col md:flex-row overflow-hidden shadow-2xl
image_result_modal.image_area: flex-1 relative bg-black flex items-center justify-center
image_result_modal.sidebar: w-full md:w-96 bg-[#121217] border-t md:border-t-0 md:border-l border-white/10 p-6 sm:p-8 flex flex-col gap-6 overflow-y-auto

faq_accordion.question: font-heading text-2xl text-[#F4F1EA] flex justify-between items-center cursor-pointer hover:text-[#C4B5FD] transition-colors

marquee.style: py-16 border-y border-white/5 bg-[#0A0A0F] overflow-hidden flex whitespace-nowrap
marquee.text: font-heading italic text-4xl sm:text-5xl text-[#F4F1EA]/30 uppercase tracking-widest mx-12 flex items-center

image_urls.description: Hand reaching towards bright light beam, highly cinematic, philosophical tone
Cinematic dark fabric texture for interior sections
Two figures illuminated by spotlights and smoke in the dark

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a cinematic, editorial platform. Install 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope' fonts from Google Fonts. Use Cormorant Garamond for headings (italicize strategically for editorial feel) and Manrope for body text. DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, Space Grotesk, or Playfair Display. The UI must strictly follow the Sober Editorial Purple palette (#0A0A0F bg, #7C3AED primary, #C4B5FD secondary). No neon glowing effects, no rainbow gradients, no 3D AI cartoonish graphics. Emojis as icons are BANNED - use lucide-react or phosphor-icons. Apply a global subtle film grain overlay. Create the marketing landing page structure as requested, followed by the robust, minimalistic dashboard. Add i18n switcher in header. Enforce `data-testid` on all interactable elements.
